parameters.query:
-- Get all sales for today with item details
SELECT 
  ps.id as sale_id,
  ps.sale_number,
  ps.sale_status,
  ps.payment_method,
  ps.total_amount as sale_total_amount,
  ps."createdAt" as sale_time,
  psi.id as sale_item_id,
  psi.brand_name,
  psi.generic_name,
  psi.quantity,
  psi.unit_price,
  psi.total_price,
  np.description as package_description,
  np.package_ndc,
  i.quantity_on_hand,
  i.lot_number,
  i.expiry_date
FROM pos_sale ps
INNER JOIN pos_sale_item psi ON psi.sale_id = ps.id
INNER JOIN ndc_package np ON np.id = psi.package_id
LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.id = psi.inventory_id
WHERE DATE(ps."createdAt") = CURRENT_DATE
  AND ps.sale_status IN ('COMPLETED', 'PARTIALLY_FILLED')
ORDER BY ps."createdAt" ASC, psi.id ASC;
